# Victor Melo

GoHighLevel implementation specialist and business automation consultant based in Miami, FL.
Founder & CEO of Vida Digital Solutions LLC.

## Expertise
- GoHighLevel (GHL) implementation & configuration
- CRM automation and RevOps
- Business process automation via n8n, Zapier, and custom integrations
- Paid advertising: Meta Ads, Google Ads, Google Guaranteed
- Website and funnel development
- System integrations via API (Stripe, ClickUp, ZapSign, WhatsApp, Asaas, and more)

## Clients
Serving businesses in the USA, Brazil, and worldwide.
Accepts payments in USD, EUR, and BRL.

## Contact
Website: victormelo.app
